nav.confirmLogout: Are you sure you want to log out?

login.title: Digital Evidence Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage evidence and review AI analysis results.
login.failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

dashboard.title: Digital Evidence Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of uploaded cases and AI analysis performance.
dashboard.noEvidence: No evidence has been uploaded yet.
dashboard.loadError: Unable to load evidence statistics. Please refresh the page.

evidenceList.title: Evidence List
evidenceList.subtitle: Search and review uploaded cases with AI analysis results.
evidenceList.noResults: No evidence matches your search and filters.
evidenceList.loadError: Unable to fetch evidence list. Please try again later.

addEvidence.title: Add New Evidence
addEvidence.subtitle: Upload case evidence and generate AI analysis, heatmap, and a forensic report.
addEvidence.accepted: JPEG, PNG, JPG, or MP4. Maximum 50 MB.
addEvidence.requiredFields: Please fill in all required fields before submitting.
addEvidence.selectFile: Please select a file before uploading.
addEvidence.unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type. Please use JPG, PNG, or MP4.
addEvidence.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Please try again or check your file.

evidenceDetails.title: Evidence Details
evidenceDetails.subtitle: Detailed case summary, AI report, and file integrity controls.
evidenceDetails.runIntegrity: Run integrity verification to confirm evidence authenticity.
evidenceDetails.loadError: Unable to load evidence details. Please try again later.
evidenceDetails.integrityFailed: Integrity check failed. Please try again.
